commands.guard: HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 -m compileall -q hipengine tests scripts && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 pytest -q tests/test_generation_batch_scheduler.py tests/test_generation_qwen35_paro.py tests/test_qwen35_resident_batch_layout.py tests/test_kvcache_policy.py tests/test_kvcache_spans.py tests/test_server_api.py -q && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 2 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c2.json && HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_correctness.py --rows 8 --json /tmp/hipengine-e2e-primitive-c8.json
commands.stress: for cycle in 1 2 3; do env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size 8 --decode-tokens 128 ... --json /tmp/hipengine-iter370-post-c8-c2-stress/cycle${cycle}-c8.json; env -u HIPENGINE_QWEN35_PROJECTION_DISPATCH_ARTIFACT HIP_VISIBLE_DEVICES=1 python3 scripts/qwen35_batch_retained_bench.py --batch-size 2 --decode-tokens 128 ... --json /tmp/hipengine-iter370-post-c8-c2-stress/cycle${cycle}-c2.json; done

conclusion: Three current no-flag c8 all-layer rowchunk default -> c2 default stress cycles stayed generated-token green on GPU1/XTX: every c8 run was [137]*8 with all full-attention producer layers rowchunked, and every following c2 run was [137,137] with serial_lm_head and native_caware_decode=true. The required active c2 verify after the stress also stayed [137,137]. This adds runtime confidence after the iter367 [137,0] c2 flake and iter369 c8 all-layer re-demotion, but does not close all residual transient risk or make any retained throughput/scaling claim.

prompt_verifier.evidence: PASS: this supplies required runtime/stability evidence under GPU1/RX 7900 XTX: repeated c8 all-layer -> c2 cycles plus active c2 verify are generated-token green vs independent c1. No retained throughput/scaling claim.

active_verify.decision_reason: artifact_path must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive_correctness_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; c1_baseline_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; serial_bridge_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; profiler_json must be provided under benchmarks/results; compiler_version_file must be a repo-relative path under benchmarks/results; primitive c>N correctness gate did not pass: no primitive correctness artifact path provided; scaling comparison vs c=1 and serial bridge baselines is incomplete; profiler trace was not captured with expected kernels present; profiler.artifact_path must be under benchmarks/results; profiler.source_artifact_path must be a non-empty string; profiler.output_format must be csv; profiler.trace_dir must be a non-empty string; profiler.trace_files must be a non-empty string list; profiler.synthesized_fields must be a string list; profiler.status must be captured; profiler.expected_kernels_present must be true; profiler.trace_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.expected_kernel_names must be a non-empty string list; profiler.kernel_durations_ns must be a non-empty object; profiler kernel names must include selected projection_dispatch candidate or variant; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.requested_mode must be batched_lm_head; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.native_row_aware_lm_head must be true; execution.batch_execution.decode_execution.sampler_execution.equality_artifact must be under benchmarks/results; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns has no observations; execution.scheduler_metadata.graph_bucket_stats.kernel_time_histogram_ns observation count must cover graph_bucket_stats.hits
